title: CHRISTMAS SILENT DISCO NORTHAMPTON
subtitle: Three channels of festive joy
description: Northampton's most festive tradition is back for its tenth year. Three channels, three DJs, one room pulsing with Christmas magic. Choose your soundtrack—whether you're team Pop, Indie or Dance—and dance like nobody's watching (because honestly, with everyone in their own musical world, they aren't). From classics that hit you right in the feels to bangers that demand immediate singalongs, this is the Christmas party that lets you soundtrack your own night. It's packed, it's buzzing, and it's the kind of festive chaos that leaves you glowing.

title: THE 2PM CLUB Northampton
subtitle: Christmas Daytime Disco
description: THE 2PM CLUB Christmas Northampton — 4 hours of iconic 80s, 90s & 00s anthems plus festive classics. All the fun of a proper night out, home by 7-ish.
fullDescription:
THE 2PM CLUB DAYTIME DISCO RETURNS TO NORTHAMPTON FOR A CHRISTMAS SPECIAL!

An Afternoon of Iconic 80s 90s 00s Anthems plus Festive Classics!

Remember when going OUT OUT didn't require a week's recovery?

Welcome to THE 2PM CLUB — the daytime disco revolution. Four hours of pure nostalgia, singalong anthems, and confetti moments. All the energy of a Saturday night out, but you'll be home by 7pm.

Your Christmas Party just got upgraded... to the afternoon!
highlights: 🎤 Singalong Anthems: Every word, every song|🎄 Festive Classics: Christmas bangers included|🕺 Home by 7pm: Maximum fun, zero hangover|🎉 Confetti Moments: The good kind of chaos|🌟 No Recovery Time: Sunday done right|💃 Dance Your Heart Out: Four hours of pure energy

title: Boombastic's Christmas Decades Party
subtitle: 80s, 90s & 00s
description: The Christmas party to end them all. Northampton's biggest decades celebration returns with four hours of 80s synth-pop, 90s anthems and 00s bangers, served with a festive twist. Whether it's Wham!, Spice Girls or Killers, this is the soundtrack to your December chaos—loud, joyous, unapologetically massive. Dress up, turn up, and sing your face off to every song you pretend you don't know all the words to. It's the kind of night that reminds you why December exists.

title: Christmas FAMILY SILENT DISCO
subtitle: For all ages
description: Jumpers on, headphones glowing, Christmas tunes blasting. This is the festive family rave where everyone gets to pick their vibe. Three channels—Pop, Dance, or Kids Classics—so parents, kids, and cool aunts can all find their groove. Watch your little ones lose it to Frozen while you secretly belt out Mariah. It's chaotic, joyful, and exactly what a Sunday afternoon in December should be. Plus, everyone's home in time for tea. Festive parenting: nailed.

title: GET READY - 60s/70s Motown, Soul & Disco
subtitle: Sunday Matinee Special
description: Join us for a Sunday matinee special of GET READY featuring the BIGGEST hits of 60s/70s Motown, Soul and Disco! Come and banish the January blues with an afternoon of 1960s and 70s classics. Our DJs will play the biggest floorfillers of the era including The Jacksons, Al Wilson, Stevie Wonder, The Four Tops, Rick James, Chic, Sister Sledge, The Temptations, James Brown, Diana Ross, The Supremes, The Marvelettes, Martha Reeves and the Vandellas, Ray Charles and more. Tickets just £6 each until 24th Dec!

title: THE 2PM CLUB Luton
subtitle: 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: THE 2PM CLUB Luton — 4 hours of iconic 80s, 90s & 00s anthems. All the fun of a proper night out, home by 7-ish.
fullDescription:
LET YOUR HAIR DOWN. PROPERLY

Remember when going OUT OUT didn't require a week's recovery? When you could sing every word, lose your voice, and still feel human the next day?

We've created the perfect solution! Welcome to THE 2PM CLUB!

4 hours from 2pm til 6pm where nothing else matters. Just you, your mates, and every anthem you've ever loved. All the fun of a proper night out – and still home by 7ish to actually enjoy your Sunday.

The 2PM Club is the night out that never gets cancelled. No more 47-message group chats. No more "maybe next time." Everyone says yes to this one.
highlights: 🎤 ICONIC ANTHEMS. NONSTOP ENERGY: Wall-to-wall 80s, 90s and 00s. Belting out lyrics with other people who know every word too. That moment when the whole room feels like family – that's what you're booking.|🕺 DAYTIME PARTY, NIGHT-OUT VIBES: Same Boombastic team, Club-level production and confetti moments – just at people-friendly hours. Dance freely, laugh loudly, and still be home by 7pm.|👯 THE 'NIGHT OUT' EVERYONE SAYS YES TO: No more 47-message threads. No more "maybe next time." Four hours where everyone actually makes it.|😎 NO SUNDAY REGRETS - JUST A GLOW: Perfect Sunday! You'll still be buzzing after a full night's sleep. A hoarse voice from belting out all the bangers is the only hangover we're talking about. Get all the buzz of a massive night out, but wake up fresh.|🏆 TRUST THE LEGACY: Created by Boombastic Events – 10+ years of consistent sell-outs across the UK because we know how to create moments that matter.
